summary: This is a brief promotional post announcing an upcoming performance by the TomTown Ramblers band at The Rockwood Music Hall. Cathy O'Neil shares her excitement about playing with her bandmates and promotes ticket sales. She highlights the original songwriting talent of band members Blair Bodine and Jamie Kingston, expressing humble appreciation for being part of such a talented group. The post also mentions merchandise will be available at the show.
key_points: TomTown Ramblers performing at Rockwood Music Hall on October 13th, 2018
Band performs mostly original songs by members Blair Bodine, Jamie Kingston, and Jake Appel
Merchandise including t-shirts and shakers will be sold at the event
money_quotes: I'm kind of just amazed I'm allowed to be in this band, they're so freaking talented.
key_insight: This is a personal announcement about the author's musical side project rather than her typical analytical content about algorithms and society.
